MODULE: cosmos.agents.base_agent
FILE: cosmos/agents/base_agent.py (1054 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Base Agent - Foundation for Specialist Agents

Novel Approaches:
1. Capability-Based Dispatch - Dynamic capability registration
2. Confidence-Aware Handoff - Know when to delegate
3. State Persistence - Maintain context across invocations
4. Learning Hooks - Track performance for evolution
5.

CLASSES:
- AgentCapability(Enum): Capabilities an agent can have.
- WanderingThought: A thought generated during mind-wandering mode.

Mind-wandering allows agents to
  Methods: def overall_quality(self) -> float
- WanderingSession: A session of mind-wandering.
- AgentStatus(Enum): Agent execution status.
- AgentState: State container for an agent.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- AgentMessage: Message passed between agents.
- TaskResult: Result of agent task execution.
- BaseAgent(ABC): Abstract base class for all cosmos agents.

Provides:
- Capability registration 
  Methods: def get_enhanced_system_prompt(self, task_context: str='') -> str
  Methods: def system_prompt(self) -> str
  Methods: async def process(self, task: str, context: Optional[dict]=None) -> TaskResult
  Methods: def can_handle(self, required_capabilities: set[AgentCapability]) -> float
  Methods: async def execute(self, task: str, context: Optional[dict]=None) -> TaskResult
  Methods: async def should_handoff(self, task: str, confidence: float) -> tuple[bool, str, str]
  Methods: async def generate_response(self, prompt: str, context: Optional[dict]=None, use_embedded_prompts: b
  Methods: def set_handoff_callback(self, callback: Callable)
